New Templates for Cloud Project SRs - Upgrade Available Reminders,IT-10717,749767,Change Request,Done,IT,IT,software,atlassianadmin,6124bbed3ef46a0070571c09,,,P2,Done,Snehal Patil,6283698562e0790069a58cee,Manny Shaw,62a1faf876c0360069f4e35c,Manny Shaw,62a1faf876c0360069f4e35c,17/Oct/22 11:22 PM,21/Nov/22 9:46 AM,,21/Nov/22 9:46 AM,November 2022,,,,,0,On_Hold,,,"Two new templates should be available for Cloud Project SRs, utilizing equivalent template behavior as +1 - Upgrade Available in place+ (and other Templates for Cloud Project SRs) with respect to emailing notifications to relevant DL.
Add new templates on the case handling form, 'notes and activities' tab.

These new Templates are only to be available for Cloud Project SRs (Item, Type = Cloud Project). It will use the 'Business Update - Cloud Operations' banner as per the existing “+1 - Upgrade Available in place”+ template.

Within the list of existing available Cloud Project SR templates, these should appear directly underneath the existing +1 - Upgrade Available in place,+ and before the +1 - Upgrade Available using UAT env+

The [Product], [Environment] and [Contact] fields should be auto-populated where they appear in the template text below. Release note is the link to relevant KA for the upgrade version, automatically linked based on upgrade version. Note also table as appearing below should be same size as in the existing +1 - Upgrade Available in place+ (appears bigger than normal in Jira description here), with the templates having same look and feel (i.e. font/table size, paragraph spacing).
* The first new template will be called: “*1 - Upgrade Available in place Reminder second email”;* the text:

This is the second email to remind you that we have scheduled your [Product] [Environment] upgrade for the below date and time.   If you would like to reschedule then please reply back to us so that we may discuss, otherwise *we will move forward with the update as planned*.
Also, kindly note that the [Product] system will be down during the upgrade.
Please refer to the [{color:#0747a6}Release Note{color}] for additional information on the new release content.
* The second new template will be called: “*1 - Upgrade Available in place Reminder third email”;* the text:

This is the third and final email to remind you that we have scheduled your [Product] [Environment] upgrade for the below date and time.   If you would like to reschedule then please reply back to us so that we may discuss, otherwise *we will move forward with the update as planned*.
Also, kindly note that the [Product] system will be down during the upgrade.
Please refer to the [{color:#0747a6}Release Note{color}] for additional information on the new release content.

Regards,",,Manny Shaw,Rivka Eisenstein,,,,62a1faf876c0360069f4e35c,62c291d8a7de1e7c7c2cdb87,,,,,,,,,0,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,03/Nov/22 6:58 AM;ug:4618850c-d06b-47ac-a3ce-1d970deeb28e;IT-10717 - New Templates for Cloud Project SRs - Upgrade Available Reminders.docx;https://nice-it.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/attachment/content/139335,21/Nov/22 9:44 AM;ug:10c4f7f2-1846-44c4-a603-a79a43979d0e;IT-10717-New Templates for Cloud Project SRs - Upgrade Available Reminders.xml;https://nice-it.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/attachment/content/139603,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,21/Nov/22 12:00 AM,,,,SNOW Dev,,,,,,,Snehal Patil,6283698562e0790069a58cee,,ApprovalsCFValue{approvals=[]},,,,,,No,,,,,,,,,,,,,Customer Support,Manny Shaw,62a1faf876c0360069f4e35c,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,Rivka Eisenstein,62c291d8a7de1e7c7c2cdb87,,{},,Enterprise,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,"Sizing document change:

*1.* helpful *2.* not helpful *3.* X to close the message.

* Option to show the pop-up in different terms for external or internal users (every KA viewed for internal and with exceptions for external)
* Option to pop-up the message every 10th (or X times) KA
* The pop-up will not be activated if the user already rated the article before closing the page (rating with stars or feedback)
* Article templates are one of : “How to”; “knowledge article”

Create new SR that will give the customers the ability to track bugs,IT-10250,748981,Change Request,Done,IT,IT,software,atlassianadmin,6124bbed3ef46a0070571c09,,,P3,Done,Dana Trybiasz,6114ed43e6e6f80071784a76,Alok Kumar,622b99569c3cce0069503815,Alok Kumar,622b99569c3cce0069503815,12/Sep/22 5:59 AM,23/Oct/22 4:11 AM,,23/Oct/22 4:11 AM,October 2022,,,,,0,,,,"Bugs are prioritize based on Bugs in Jira.  It should not be part of ER process.
When the PO gets a bug as a ER (product task) he will reject it as ""Not valid ER"" and ask to open a bug.

Ideally we wanted that CS will be able to identify that something is a bug and not an enhancement request, and do not send bugs to PO.   Ideally we also discussed that if it happens, then the PO will send it back to CS, ask to cancel the product task and open a bug.
A bug should not sit in the ERs queue. Hence this CR is to create new SR that will give the customers the ability to track bugs

Create Calendar Appointments in Wiser,IT-6167,15795,Change Request,Done,IT,IT,software,atlassianadmin,6124bbed3ef46a0070571c09,,,P2,Done,Dana Trybiasz,6114ed43e6e6f80071784a76,Aviv Zamir,621f1bd76a4c4c0070adaaee,Eitan Fireberg,621f1c4f94f7e20069fdd50c,27/Dec/21 2:48 PM,27/Mar/24 2:22 PM,,12/Dec/23 11:00 AM,August 2023,,,,,0,wiser_backlog,,,"Please find below requirements and high-level customer experience flow, let me know when you want to discuss.

* 'Set A Meeting' button will initially appear when a case: 'Assigned to Engineer' and Status is 'WIP' and only to Critical and High case impact (this will change latter on and include also 'Medium' and 'Low' once we will work with it for a while)
* After clicking the button from Portal / Tech View pop up with the engineer calendar will appear (owner of the case)
* TZ – to set the Engineer calendar according to the Customer TZ​
* Option to extend to another 30 min / to close the calendar 30 min before and after a meeting  ​​
* Calendar will open for 48 hours availability slots
* If there are no slots available to jump a day forward, and share notification to the engineer about a far a way meeting schedule so he can try to promote​
* Set a Meeting option after re-assignment of a case will open the current case owner calendar​​
* Option to add to the meeting CSM / TAM / others Nice employees / other external contacts related to the customer ​ ​
* Set a Meeting option will be unavailable when the case status is ""new"", ""resolved"", ""closed""​, planned meeting​
* Holidays / Weekends – the functionality will not be available during the weekend and holidays and the calendars will be unavailable for meeting during Holidays and Weekends
* Integration with Teams should support the option that if engineer calendar is available but he is in a call than it will show as unavailable to set a meeting
* Another option is to close the calendar half an hour after assigned to a case ('go over the case' time before customer can set a meeting)
* Meeting subject: NICE Support Meeting *Case#*,*Customer#*, *Case Owner*​
* Meeting Invite: will contain link to Wiser Portal and Case, Link to reschedule or cancel the meeting
* Meeting Invite will send to Engineer and Customer Emails so they can approve, reject or reschedule the meeting – approving the meeting will set it in their calendar
* Add a Flag that customer has approved the meeting
* Meeting Invite will sent as BCC to the Engineer manager and the assigned TAM as default.
* Meeting Invite will sent as ""Nice Customer Support"" from any domain
* Meeting Notes section will appear as part of the case after the call ended (Template in the Case handling form with main decisions and next steps)​ and will be sent to customer from Wiser
* If a case already have a meeting set, the date and time will appear next to the 'Set A Meeting' button
* If a case already have a meeting set, another meeting can’t be set​ to the same day from the customer side
* If a case already have a meeting set, no limitation from the engineer side
* If a case already have a meeting set, the meeting slot can be rescheduled ​
* The meeting slot can be rescheduled until the start time of the meeting​
* If a case already have a meeting set, the meeting slot can be cancelled​
* The meeting slot can be cancelled until the start time of the meeting​
* If a case already have a meeting set and the engineer assigned the case to a higher tier, a reschedule notification will be send to the customer with the current case owner calendar ​
* Notification – in creation, change or cancel, meeting notes after the call ended, pre-meeting (1/2 h) ​
* Case can't be resolved with a future scheduled meeting, Support needs to get the customer consent to cancel the meeting before Case resolved
* Group manager should get the permissions to change the engineer assigned and his calendar to a meeting by reassign the case to the available engineer
* To check the option for a managers view  (scheduled meetings / meeting history ) – per customer per case

* Interface failure – pop up will be presented as a landing page that direct the customer to try later / call (?) / write a massage in the pop-up that will be presented at the case as external comment that the customer has tried to set a meeting so the engineer can send notification via the ‘Set A Meeting’ button once it's up again

* Reports - TBD ",,Eitan Fireberg,Ran Leibovitz,Rivka Eisenstein,,,621f1c4f94f7e20069fdd50c,621f1b7dc4d0fe00695291d5,62c291d8a7de1e7c7c2cdb87,,,,,,,,0,,,,IT-6901,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,Integration Dev,SNOW Dev,,,,,,Dana Trybiasz,6114ed43e6e6f80071784a76,,ApprovalsCFValue{approvals=[]},,,,,,No,,,,,,,,,,,,,Customer Support,Aviv Zamir,621f1bd76a4c4c0070adaaee,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,Rivka Eisenstein,62c291d8a7de1e7c7c2cdb87,,{},,Enterprise,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,"Sizing document change:

Those are currently loaded together with the form fields. In some forms (like Case), there are quite a few lists. This affects the loading time of the entire form. There are 2 additional options we can set.
1. Differed option - first load the form, and only than load the lists

2. On demand option - the system will not load the lists at all, but there will be a button at the bottom of the form where the user can click on and this will load the lists.",,Dana Trybiasz,,,,,6114ed43e6e6f80071784a76,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,"*The display of related lists inside records* - we would like to set the default related list loading time to be +Differed+ option. Number of records to display in lists ,IT-2567,17468,Story,Done,IT,IT,software,atlassianadmin,6124bbed3ef46a0070571c09,,,None,Done,Dana Trybiasz,6114ed43e6e6f80071784a76,Dana Trybiasz,6114ed43e6e6f80071784a76,Dana Trybiasz,6114ed43e6e6f80071784a76,27/Apr/21 11:56 AM,03/May/21 6:40 AM,,03/May/21 6:40 AM,May 2021,,,,,0,,,,"we currently allow users to display up to 100 records in one page when looking at lists.

This substantially affects the loading times. Not just of lists, also of other entities that include lists (like homepages). One of their most interesting insights was that not only this affects the person himself, but consumes system resources that basically affect the whole instance behavior. Imagine just 100 of the ~700 users with this setting loading a list at the same time... probably happens.

Their recommendation is to default all users to 20 records per list. And also remove the option of 100 at all. Leave 50 as the highest one possible to choose by users.",,Dana Trybiasz,,,,,6114ed43e6e6f80071784a76,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,"*Number of records to display in lists* - we would like to:

MACD SR adjustments to serve AMS requirements ,IT-2318,16809,Change Request,Done,IT,IT,software,atlassianadmin,6124bbed3ef46a0070571c09,,,P2,Done,Dana Trybiasz,6114ed43e6e6f80071784a76,Guy Stein,6114ecb4627b5600688c5995,Guy Stein,6114ecb4627b5600688c5995,07/Apr/21 2:47 PM,29/Jun/25 10:19 PM,,24/May/21 10:03 AM,May 2021,,,,,0,Best_Efforts,,,"Name for Service Request – “*Managed Services – Service Request*”
the SR will be opened when customer will need AMS assistance on the following items -

# Service requests are different from Issues for which incident tickets are raised at WISER, These types of requests can be of some specific information requested or enhancement/service required by client. It is very difficult to manage such service requests as WISER incident tickets, also there are no single Service request forms available which can be used for this purpose. At Actimize- AMS level we need a service request form which can be used.

-By various clients as single point to raise the various types service requests. We can give option to client to raise specific Service requests based on the drop down field ""Service Request Type"". This way client's confusion can be eliminated and they can raise all AMS related service request at single form to AMS instead of raising the AMS SRs to incorrect teams
-This will also ensure the AMS related service request will fall into AMS bucket and not on undesired bucket which could result delay in delivering the SRs to client.

-As AMS service requests are different from WISER Incident tickets, and we have separate contracts for SRs especially for Essentials and hosted clients, this separate SR form for AMS will also ease the management, categorization and report creation of Service Requests which needs to be shared with client and higher management periodically.

Summary
The issue involves enabling a cloud project for X-Sight Next Gen, which is part of a hybrid deployment setup.

All Actimize X-Sight NG deployments are hybrid. This means they require both the X-Sight NG and the X-Sight Enterprise (XSE) product for deployment - the X-Sight NG team works mainly at Jira & the XSE at Wiser (GCO).
h3. We would like to create one cloud project with multiple different cloud requests
* Enable cloud project for X-Sight NG.
* Create 2 provisioning requests - one for XSE & one for NG
* Create 2 witlisting requests -  one for XSE & one for NG
--> High-level design for MVP of phase 1 - fully manual [^Capability_XSNG_Cloud_Project_MVP 1.docx]

--> High-level design for phase 2 - customize process with automations [^Capability_XSNG_Cloud_Project_PostMVP 1.docx] ",,Ilan Schwartzman,,,,,621781d1ba649b006aad7e40,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,16/Apr/26 1:26 PM;ug:70c1a483-2c80-4d25-bbb4-9349ee25e8a7;Capability_XSNG_Cloud_Project_MVP 1.docx;https://nice-it.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/attachment/content/183943,16/Apr/26 1:26 PM;ug:70c1a483-2c80-4d25-bbb4-9349ee25e8a7;Capability_XSNG_Cloud_Project_PostMVP 1.docx;https://nice-it.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/attachment/content/183944,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,ApprovalsCFValue{approvals=[]},,,,,,No,,,,,,,,,,,,,Customer Support,Ilan Schwartzman,621781d1ba649b006aad7e40,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,{},,Actimize,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,"Sizing document change:
# New Deployment Phase value 'XSNG Deployment' added to existing LOV (Build, Activation).

# New 'XSNG Deployment Information' section on Cloud Project form when Deployment Phase = XSNG Deployment — fields: Customer, Region, Tenant Type, Admin/PS emails, SKUs, Sizing, Currency, Timezone, Connectivity Mode, Client IPs, XSE versions.

# New request domain 'X-Sight Next-Gen' with 10 categories: Tenant Creation, DLH Onboarding, S3 Creation, Failure Alerts, Whitelisting, XSNG->ActOne Connectivity, ActOne->XSNG Connectivity, Entitlements Config, Feed File Replication (XSE), Feed File Replication (XSNG).
# Five new assignment groups: XSNG Cloud Deployments, XSNG DevOps, XSNG Platform R&D, XSNG Data Migration, XSNG CloudOps.

# 'Initiate Workflow' button on XSNG Cloud Project creates two parallel child SRs: XSE Tenant Creation (AWS Provisioning/Deployment) + XSNG Tenant Creation (X-Sight Next-Gen/Tenant Creation). Button disabled after click.

# Dependency triggers: XSNG tenant resolution -> DLH, S3, Alerts, Whitelisting-XSNG. XSE tenant resolution -> Whitelisting-ActOne. Both tenants -> Connectivity (both directions). S3 + tenants -> Feed File Replication.
# Per-child-SR variable copy tables defined (Appendix A.5): parent variables copied to child, editable on child without affecting source. Auto-created SRs have read-only domain/category.
# Cancelled child SRs do not block workflow (CEA rule #2). Manual child creation auto-populates defined variables (CEA rule #4).
# Smoke Test, Completion Report, SAN, Closure remain as step fields on the Cloud Project record (not child SRs).",,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,To Do,13/Apr/26 8:05 PM

RCA SLA Enhancement,IT-31600,840835,Change Request,Qualified,IT,IT,software,atlassianadmin,6124bbed3ef46a0070571c09,,,P2,,Yana Gurevich,6335750888ed2ebef97ca2a5,Linoy Tsarfaty,6114ec62eb7aef006967538b,Linoy Tsarfaty,6114ec62eb7aef006967538b,04/Feb/26 8:15 AM,15/Jun/26 3:37 PM,,,March 2026,,,,,0,,,,"h3. *Background*
Currently, the RCA SLA continues to run even if a case that was previously set to _Resolved_ is moved back to _WIP_. This creates inaccurate SLA reporting.
Please update the RCA SLA logic as follows:
If a case moves from *Resolved* back to *other active status*, the RCA SLA should be *automatically canceled*.
If the case is later moved to *Resolved* again, the RCA SLA should be *automatically re‑initiated*.

*RCA SLA Showing as Missed for Case CS4543245, please also cancle it as part of this CR",,Linoy Tsarfaty,,,,,6114ec62eb7aef006967538b,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,SNOW Dev,,,,,,,,,,ApprovalsCFValue{approvals=[]},,,,,,No,,,,,,,,,,,,,Customer Support,Linoy Tsarfaty,6114ec62eb7aef006967538b,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,{},,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,"Sizing document change:

Project Risk Mitigation",FALSE,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,Wiser,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,New,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,1|i09k4z:,,,No,,,,,,,,,,,,,Linoy Tsarfaty,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,IT S56 (9 Feb - 23 Feb 2026),IT S57 (23 Feb - 9 Mar 2026),IT S58 (9 Mar - 23 Mar 2026),IT S59 (23 Mar - 6 Apr 2026),IT S60 (6 Apr - 20 Apr 2026),IT S61 (20 Apr - 4 May 2026),IT S62 (4 May - 18 May 2026),IT S63 (18 May - 1 Jun 2026),IT S64 (1 Jun - 15 Jun 2026),IT S65 (15 Jun - 29 Jun 2026),,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,Customer Support,,"* RCA SLA definition updated: new cancel condition added — fires when case status transitions FROM Resolved TO any active (non-Resolved, non-Closed) status

Telco CDR Monthly Report by Call Month,IT-27482,810885,Change Request,Qualified,IT,IT,software,atlassianadmin,6124bbed3ef46a0070571c09,,,P3,,Jonathan Jensen,712020:4c7bb93a-69d9-47b6-bc60-f97d9b955661,Eitan Fireberg,621f1c4f94f7e20069fdd50c,Eitan Fireberg,621f1c4f94f7e20069fdd50c,12/Aug/25 7:28 AM,15/Jun/26 3:36 PM,,,September 2025,,,,,0,,,,"We request IT’s help in creating and managing a CDR Breakdown Report by Call Month.  This is a report that was built by me several years ago and that Austin on the Billing team currently manages.  The data from this report is used in Mike’s presentation to the SLT on a regular basis and its accuracy is crucial.  We need this report to be IT created and supported going forward.  I ask for your help in assigning resources to this project.

Each month after the invoice cycle ends and CDR’s are pushed to the Support site, Billing (Austin) runs a report for Mike Perry’s team that shows Telco Minutes and Revenue by “Call Month” rather than by Invoice month.  This is a critical report Mike’s team to compare billed minutes by Call Month against what Telco providers are charging us in minutes.  The report takes many hours to run each month due to the very large number of CDR’s that must be queried.  I’m sure that IT resources will be able to better optimize and support this report going forward.

Once you have created the project and assigned resources, we will provide you the SQL query that we run and will meet with your team to discuss how to successfully transition this report to IT.  This may be project that you assign to MCL for development given their deep knowledge about CDR rating, Split Sonus Tables and large volume of data.  Mike stated that he would prefer to have his team run this report if at all possible so that they’re not dependent on another group to provide the data.

Committed Quantity Automation Business Rule - New Requirement,IT-29665,826794,Change Request,In UAT,IT,IT,software,atlassianadmin,6124bbed3ef46a0070571c09,,,P3,,Meital Rashti,70121:33c9c08c-01ca-4a34-ac93-994a2946b894,Meital Rashti,70121:33c9c08c-01ca-4a34-ac93-994a2946b894,Meital Rashti,70121:33c9c08c-01ca-4a34-ac93-994a2946b894,17/Nov/25 5:40 AM,15/Jun/26 3:36 PM,,,April 2026,,,,,0,SFDC_Automation_to_Cadebill,,,"*Background*: When we launched the automation we faced a challenge. The underlying rule was that SOFTW and SOFTU (Software MRC & Usage) will be transferred with a quantity of 1. But there were several exceptions – for specific SKUs and specific SKUs per specific partner (RingCentral & Verizon).
There was no +SF+ +identifier+ for the relevant SKUs, so we relied on SKU External Description and asked MCL to create a business rule for all the SKUs which should be entered with quoted quantity.
Maintaining this list would be a nightmare and prone to errors.
Since then, we moved RingCentral automation to rely on Unit of Measure Business Rule.
For each SKU, *Workato* will “look” at the SKU page and for identified Unit of Measure and Partner RingCentral, will transfer the quoted quantity
Now, SF has created a field on the SKU level, like Unit of Measure, defining whether the SKU should be billed by contracted quantity or higher or normally according to usage.

# Create a new generic Business Rule: For Product Family “Software MRC” or “Software Usage” Workato will look at the SKU “Contracted_QTY__c” and if True will transfer to Cadebill the quoted “Quantity”
# In Parallel, create “Verizon Contracted Quantity” BR.
## If opp Partner Account INCLUDES Verizon AND

|#|A new split (#3) has to be added so that the RT Audio product (new product) can be additionally billed.|
|#|Which account to be billed is not directly available information in Cadebill. So, a separate table needs to be built.|
|#|The table would have all the TG listed and the ""billable_account_no"" to which the RT Audio product needs to be billed.|
|#|The per minute rate will be assigned in Cadebill using the current UI/method.|

|#|The ingress_bu as available in the CDR must be stored as ""instrument_id"" and the account_no also updated as the ""billable_account_no"". This will be done as part of the scrub rules for split #3.|

|#|The ingress_bu as available in the CDR must be stored as ""instrument_id"" and the account_no also updated as the ""billable_account_no"". This will be done as part of the scrub rules for split #3.|
|#|When invoicing is done, the ""instrument_id"" in Data.invoice_details table will have the ""ingress_bu"".|
|#|New UI as needed to manage the new table that will contain the list of accounts billed for this new product.|
|#|Modify error handling rules to include “spins” for the new split (#3). Modify the daily spin reports to include split #3 as well.|

|10.|Since adding a new split to CDR is considered moderately complex task, we have to validate the CDRs for at least one billing period (30 days) to make sure that the new split works as expected and the existing splits (#1 and #2) continue to produce the same results as before.|
|11.|Validate in the lab environment, deploy to production environment after approval from NICE.|
|12.|Post production support for 30 days to make sure that everything is working as expected in the production environment.|

Import Rebill Quantities into Cadebill,IT-27365,810247,Change Request,In UAT,IT,IT,software,atlassianadmin,6124bbed3ef46a0070571c09,,,P3,,Jonathan Jensen,712020:4c7bb93a-69d9-47b6-bc60-f97d9b955661,Eitan Fireberg,621f1c4f94f7e20069fdd50c,Eitan Fireberg,621f1c4f94f7e20069fdd50c,06/Aug/25 11:22 AM,15/Jun/26 3:36 PM,,,November 2025,September 2025,,,,0,,,,We talked to all of you about adding the ability to Import Rebill Quantities into Cadebill.  It would be a new Import option for this screen.  We would prefer to either add based on CPID OR SKU (all 3 parts).  Please add this project to your list if it is not there already.,,Eitan Fireberg,,,,,621f1c4f94f7e20069fdd50c,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,22/Oct/25 3:40 PM;ug:1353b372-f51b-4375-b95a-b04dcee93ca7;OverrideRebillQuantities.xlsx;https://nice-it.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/attachment/content/167002,22/Oct/25 3:40 PM;ug:1353b372-f51b-4375-b95a-b04dcee93ca7;Steps to Import Rebill Quantities.docx;https://nice-it.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/attachment/content/167003,06/Aug/25 11:25 AM;ug:1353b372-f51b-4375-b95a-b04dcee93ca7;image (4).png;https://nice-it.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/attachment/content/162616,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,jonathan.jensen,712020:0ccf8b0f-2002-4a3d-bc14-ae34e9bc6d3c,,ApprovalsCFValue{approvals=[]},,,,,,No,,,,,,,,,,,,,Billing,Roi Yossefi,6114ec8f8c15ca006feba02a,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,{},,CX,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,"Sizing document change:
Please find attached the document detailing the steps to import rebill quantities, along with the Excel file used for testing “Import Via Excel Option”.
Additionally, we have implemented a change in the “Add New Rebill Quantities” UI by making the Account Number a mandatory field.
This enhancement is intended to improve the overall performance and usability of the user interface.

Thanks for the document.  I agree with adding Account number to the import.  I like importing via Text or Excel for new entries or updates.  All that looks great.  It is similar to what we do with other imports into Cadebill.  Thank you.

I believe my original request was to be able to import using a SKU instead of requiring the CPID.  For the Billing team, looking up the CPID is manual and time consuming especially if there are several or many records to import.  We plan to use this rebill import when LiveVox is integrated into Cadebill and there will likely be hundreds of LiveVox imports monthly beginning in January.

Request:  Can you enhance the import/update function using Account# and SKU (ProductID, FeatureKey, FeatureDetailID)?  The import would need to use the ChargeDate to determine which CPID is Active as part of the import.  I understand that there may be times where there may be more than 1 active CPID for the Account and ChargeDate so there would need to be some method to ""Prompt"" users to select the correct CPID, or Reject the batch and provide an error message on which lines could not be imported due to multiple active CPID's.  Can this be done?  What concerns or issues am I missing with this request?

We can test this new import function and roll that into Production as Step 1.  My request is that we figure out Step 2 which would be uploading Quantity by Account, SKU (parts) and Chargedate.  Thoughts?",,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,In Progress,22/Oct/25 3:41 PM
